title: Zombie Apocalypse Mod
description:
This just a mod about Zombie Apocalypse.
Adds new weapons, armor and zombies.
body:
- Adds Armor: SWAT, Basketball armor, "Russ" Clothes.
- Adds Weapone: Katana, 3 type of bat, Heavy Hammer, knife, machete.
- Adds Zombies: Runner, Boomers (Hazmat), Military.

All Zombies spawn in day and night so thats can be hard.
